```{r}
Sig_sp_int_15_30_Table <- make_cardiac_table(
  fit = fit2,
  coef_name = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530",
  mapping = mapping,
  cardiac_go = cardiac_go
)

Sig_sp_int_15_30_Table_StrongCardiac <- Sig_sp_int_15_30_Table %>% 
  filter(category == 'Strong cardiac')
```

```{r}
background_genes <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Gene)
sig_genes <- df_dir_02_human$Gene  

  ego <- enrichGO(
  gene     = sig_genes,
  universe = background_genes,
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType  = "ENSEMBL",
  ont      = "BP",
  readable = FALSE
)

go_table_Int02_HumanUp <- as.data.frame(ego)
```

```{r}
background_genes <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Gene)
sig_genes <- df_dir_02_chimp$Gene  

  ego <- enrichGO(
  gene     = sig_genes,
  universe = background_genes,
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType  = "ENSEMBL",
  ont      = "BP",
  readable = FALSE
)

go_table_Int02_ChimpUp <- as.data.frame(ego)
```


```{r}
# # BiocManager::install("biomaRt", update = TRUE, ask = FALSE)
# library(biomaRt)
# 
# base <- sig_int_Traj2 %>%
#   rownames_to_column("ENSEMBL")
# 
# mart <- useEnsembl(
#   biomart = "genes",
#   dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl",
#   mirror = "useast"
# )
# 
# mapping <- getBM(
#   attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
#   filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
#   values = base,
#   mart = mart
# )
# 
# mapping <- mapping %>%
#   filter(hgnc_symbol != "") %>%
#   distinct(ensembl_gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
# 
# results_annot <- merge(sig_int_Traj2, mapping,
#                        by.x = "row.names",
#                        by.y = "ensembl_gene_id",
#                        all.x = TRUE)
# 
# colnames(results_annot)[1] <- "ENSEMBL"
# 
# library(clusterProfiler)
# library(org.Hs.eg.db)
# 
# ego <- enrichGO(
#   gene          = mapping$ensembl_gene_id,
#   OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
#   keyType       = "ENSEMBL",
#   ont           = "BP",
#   readable      = TRUE
# )
# 
# go_table <- ego@result
# 
# cardiac_go <- go_table[
#   grepl("heart|cardiac|cardiovascular|circulatory", 
#         go_table$Description, ignore.case = TRUE),
# ]
# 
# cardiac_genes <- unique(unlist(strsplit(cardiac_go$geneID, "/")))
# 
# results_annot$cardiac_category <- ifelse(
#   results_annot$hgnc_symbol %in% cardiac_genes,
#   "Cardiac-related",
#   "None"
# )
# 
# results_annot$score <- ifelse(results_annot$hgnc_symbol %in% cardiac_genes, 1, 0)
# 
# results_annot$category <- case_when(
#   
#   !is.na(results_annot$adj.P.Val) &
#   !is.na(results_annot$logFC) &
#   results_annot$score == 1 &
#   results_annot$adj.P.Val < 0.05 &
#   abs(results_annot$logFC) > 1 ~ "Strong cardiac",
#   
#   results_annot$score == 1 &
#   (results_annot$adj.P.Val < 0.05 |
#    abs(results_annot$logFC) > 0.5) ~ "Moderate cardiac",
#   
#   results_annot$score == 1 ~ "Weak cardiac",
#   
#   TRUE ~ "None"
# )
# 
# mapping <- mapping %>%
#   dplyr::rename(ENSEMBL = ensembl_gene_id)
# 
# final_table <- sig_int_Traj2 %>%
#   tibble::rownames_to_column("ENSEMBL") %>%
#   
#   # join gene symbols
#   left_join(mapping, by = "ENSEMBL") %>%
#   
#   # join limma-based annotations (your category lives here)
#   left_join(results_annot %>% 
#               dplyr::select(ENSEMBL, category),
#             by = "ENSEMBL") %>%
#   
#   dplyr::select(ENSEMBL, hgnc_symbol, logFC, adj.P.Val, category)
# 
# results_annot %>%
#   filter(category == "Strong cardiac") %>%
#   pull(ENSEMBL)

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day5, fig.width = 15, fig.height= 10}
int_Traj5 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25")
top_int_Traj5 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25", number=20)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj5)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD4_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day5","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day5","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day15, fig.width = 15, fig.height= 10}
int_Traj15 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515")
top_int_Traj15 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515", number=20)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj15)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD4_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day5","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day5","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Day30, fig.width = 15, fig.height= 10}
int_Traj30 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530")
top_int_Traj30 <- topTable(fit2, coef="Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", number=20)
top_genes <- rownames(top_int_Traj30)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

expr_mat <- v2$E[top_genes, ]  # expression for top genes

plot_df <- as.data.frame(t(expr_mat))
plot_df$Sample <- rownames(plot_df)

plot_df <- cbind(plot_df, RNA_Metadata_NoD4_NoRep)

# Make time numeric for ordering
plot_df$Time <- factor(plot_df$Cond,
                       levels=c("H_Day0","H_Day2","H_Day5","H_Day15","H_Day30",
                                "C_Day0","C_Day2","C_Day5","C_Day15","C_Day30"))

library(ggplot2)

gene_to_plot <- top_genes[1]

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=Cond,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       y="log2 CPM")

plot_df$TimeOnly <- gsub("H_|C_", "", plot_df$Cond)
plot_df$TimeOnly <- factor(plot_df$TimeOnly,
                           levels=c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=.data[[gene_to_plot]],
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line", size=1.2) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=3) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title=paste("Interaction trajectory:", gene_to_plot),
       x="Time",
       y="log2 CPM")
plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_genes),
               names_to="Gene",
               values_to="Expression")

ggplot(plot_long,
       aes(x=TimeOnly,
           y=Expression,
           color=Species,
           group=Species)) +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="line") +
  stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point") +
  facet_wrap(~Gene, scales="free_y") +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Interactions_Overlaps, fig.width = 15, fig.height= 10}

# Make a copy to be safe
chdgene_table_copy <- chdgene_table
# 
# # Check
# colnames(chdgene_table_copy)
# 
# #ENSEMBL ID
# all_ensembl_ids <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Gene)
# 
# ensembl <- useMart(
#   "ensembl",
#   dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl"
# )
# 
# ensembl_to_hgnc <- getBM(
#   attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
#   filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
#   values = all_ensembl_ids,
#   mart = ensembl
# ) %>%
#   filter(hgnc_symbol != "") %>%
#   distinct()
# 
# saveRDS(
#   ensembl_to_hgnc,
#   "data/DGE/Species/Ensembl_to_HGNC_mapping.RDS"
# )

ensembl_to_hgnc <- readRDS("data/DGE/Species/Ensembl_to_HGNC_mapping.RDS")

# Loop through my data sets to overlap
known_genes <- chdgene_table_copy$Gene

CHD_overlap_results <- list()

for (day in names(RNA_sets)) {

  message("Processing ", day)

  DEG_Set <- unique(RNA_sets[[day]]$DEGs$Gene)
  Non_DEG_Set <- unique(RNA_sets[[day]]$NonDEGs$Gene)

  # ---- DEG overlaps ----
  DEG_Overlaps_symbols <- ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id[
    ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id %in% DEG_Set &
    ensembl_to_hgnc$hgnc_symbol %in% known_genes 
  ]

  # ---- Non-DEG overlaps ----
  Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols <- ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id[
    ensembl_to_hgnc$ensembl_gene_id %in% Non_DEG_Set &
    ensembl_to_hgnc$hgnc_symbol %in% known_genes
  ]

  CHD_overlap_results[[day]] <- list(
    DEG_CHD_Genes = unique(DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    NonDEG_CHD_Genes = unique(Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols)
  )

  saveRDS(
    unique(DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    paste0("data/DGE/Species/", day, "_DEG_CHDGenes.RDS")
  )

  saveRDS(
    unique(Non_DEG_Overlaps_symbols),
    paste0("data/DGE/Species/", day, "_NonDEG_CHDGenes.RDS")
  )
}

```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day02"
C_comp <- "C_Day02"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day25"
C_comp <- "C_Day25"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )


```


```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day515"
C_comp <- "C_Day515"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0}
H_comp <- "H_Day1530"
C_comp <- "C_Day1530"

df_wide <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-15, 15)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]])) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_neg,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  xlim(x_limits) +
  ylim(y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp)
  )
```


####RMGO_All

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data}
RNA_Metadata_NoRep <- RNA_Metadata %>%
  filter(!grepl("R$",Individual))

Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoRep <- Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

RNA_Metadata_NoRep$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day4","Human_Day5","Human_Day15","Human_Day30","Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day4","Chimp_Day5","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

#create DGEList object
dge_RMGO_All <- DGEList(counts = Filt_RMG0_RNA_fc_NoRep)
dge_RMGO_All$samples$group <- factor(RNA_Metadata_NoRep$dgelist)
dge_RMGO_All <- calcNormFactors(dge_RMGO_All, method = "TMM")
dge_RMGO_All$samples

dim(dge_RMGO_All)
# saveRDS(dge_RMGO_All, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/dge_RMGO_All.RDS")
dge_RMGO_All$samples

```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Species <- factor(
  RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Timepoint <- factor(
  RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int_RMG0_All <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data = RNA_Metadata_NoRep)

colnames(design_int_RMG0_All)
colnames(design_int_RMG0_All) <- make.names(colnames(design_int_RMG0_All))

# saveRDS(design_int_RMG0_All, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/design_int_RMG0_All.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
dge <- dge_RMGO_All
design_int <- design_int_RMG0_All

# Step 1: voom first
v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)

# saveRDS(v1,"data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/v1_RMG0_All.RDS")

# Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Individual)
corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation

# Step 3: voom again including correlation
v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
           block = RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Individual,
           correlation = corfit.correlation)

# Step 4: fit linear model
fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Timepoint)))
day <- RNA_Metadata_NoRep$Timepoint

plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

# saveRDS(fit, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/fit_RMG0_All.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_Data_Model}
fit <- fit_RMG0_All
design_int <- design_int_RMG0_All

contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(

  # Species differences
  HvC_Day0  = SpeciesH,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  HvC_Day4  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  HvC_Day15 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  HvC_Day30 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30,
  
  #Trajectory differences
  H_Day02 = TimepointDay2 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day24 = TimepointDay4 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day45 = TimepointDay5 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  H_Day515 = TimepointDay15 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  H_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  C_Day02 = TimepointDay2,
  C_Day24 = TimepointDay4 - TimepointDay2,
  C_Day45 = TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay4,
  C_Day515 = TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5,
  C_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15,
  
  # True interaction tests trajectory
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay4 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay4,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  
  levels = design_int
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

plotSA(fit2, main = "RNA Model")

results_summary <- decideTests(fit2,
                               adjust.method = "BH",
                               p.value = 0.05)
summary(results_summary)

# saveRDS(fit2, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/fit2_RMG0_All.RDS")
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable}
fit2 <- fit2_RMG0_All

#Create Human TopTable. using listapply, then you can pull specific comp using the $
TopTables_RNA_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients) 

TopTable_RNA_All <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(TopTables_RNA_names,function(ct) {
    
    tt <- topTable(
      fit2,
      coef = ct,
      number = Inf,
      sort.by = "p"
    )
    
    #add identifiers
    tt$Gene <- rownames(tt)
    tt$Comparisons <- ct
    
    tt
  })
)

Comparison_names <- unique(TopTable_RNA_All$Comparisons)

# saveRDS(TopTable_RNA_All, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All.RDS")
# saveRDS(Comparison_names, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/Comparison_names_RNA_All_RMGO_All.RDS")

head(TopTable_RNA_All)
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable_VolcancoPlots}
TopTable_RNA_All <- TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All
Comparison_names <- Comparison_names_RMGO_All

# Calculate global axis limits
x_limits <- range(TopTable_RNA_All$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
y_limits <- range(-log10(TopTable_RNA_All$P.Value), na.rm = TRUE)

plot <- list()

for (n in Comparison_names) {
  data_n <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == n)
  
  plot[[n]] <- generate_volcano_plot(data_n, n) +
    ggplot2::xlim(x_limits) +
    ggplot2::ylim(y_limits)
}

# Print plots
for (n in Comparison_names) {
  print(plot[[n]])
}
```

```{r RNASeq_DGE_Trajectory_TopTable_Subsetting0.05}
TopTable_RNA_All <- TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All
Comparison_names <- Comparison_names_RMGO_All

RNA_sets <- map(
  Comparison_names,
  ~ {
    df <- TopTable_RNA_All %>%
      filter(Comparisons == paste0(.x))

    list(
      DEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05),
      NonDEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val >= 0.05)
    )
  }
)


names(RNA_sets) <- paste0(Comparison_names)

# saveRDS(RNA_sets, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/RNA_sets_RMG0_All.RDS")
```

```{r}

TopTable_RNA_All <- TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All
Comparison_names <- Comparison_names_RMGO_All
RNA_sets <- RNA_sets_RMG0_All

TopTable_RNA_All$absfc <- abs(TopTable_RNA_All$logFC)

TopTable_RNA_Inter <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

Inter_02_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_24_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_45_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_515_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_1530_genes <- unique(RNA_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530$DEGs$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter_02_genes  = Inter_02_genes,
  Inter_24_genes  = Inter_24_genes,
  Inter_45_genes  = Inter_45_genes,
  Inter_515_genes  = Inter_515_genes,
  Inter_1530_genes  = Inter_1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_Inter)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_Inter)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


# saveRDS(TopTable_RNA_Inter, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/TopTable_RNA_Inter_RMG0_Al.RDS")
```

```{r}
TopTable_RNA_All <- TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All
fit2 <- fit2_RMG0_All

traj_info <- list(
  Traj02 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02", comp = "Day02"),
  Traj24 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24", comp = "Day24"),
  Traj45 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45", comp = "Day45"),
  Traj515 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515", comp = "Day515"),
  Traj1530 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", comp = "Day1530")
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(traj_info), function(name) {

    info <- traj_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable_RNA_All,
      fit_obj = fit2
    )

  }),
  names(traj_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/Interaction_Directions_All.RDS")
```

```{r}


TopTable_RNA_All <- TopTable_RNA_All_RMGO_All
Comparison_names <- Comparison_names_RMGO_All
RNA_sets <- Interaction_Directions_All

TopTable_RNA_All$absfc <- abs(TopTable_RNA_All$logFC)

TopTable_RNA_Inter <- TopTable_RNA_All %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day24","H_Day45","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day24","C_Day45","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

a <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj02$all$Gene)
b <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj02$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
c <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj02$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
d <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj02$same$Gene)
e <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj24$all$Gene)
f <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj24$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
g <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj24$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
h <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj24$same$Gene)
i <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj45$all$Gene)
j <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj45$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
k <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj45$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
l <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj45$same$Gene)
m <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj515$all$Gene)
n <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj515$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
o <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj515$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
p <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj515$same$Gene)
q <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj1530$all$Gene)
r <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj1530$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
s <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj1530$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
t <- unique(RNA_sets$Traj1530$same$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter02_All = a,
  Inter02_HumanPos = b,
  Inter02_ChimpPos = c,
  Inter02_Same = d,
  Inter24_All = e,
  Inter24_HumanPos = f,
  Inter24_ChimpPos = g,
  Inter24_Same = h,
  Inter45_All = j,
  Inter45_HumanPos = j,
  Inter45_ChimpPos = k,
  Inter45_Same = l,
  Inter515_All = m,
  Inter515_HumanPos = n,
  Inter515_ChimpPos = o,
  Inter515_Same = p,
  Inter1530_All = q,
  Inter1530_HuamnPos = r,
  Inter1530_ChimpPos = s,
  Inter1530_Same = t
  
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_RNA_Inter)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r}
fit2 <- fit2_RMG0_All
v <- v1_RMG0_All

EnrichGo_Traj02 <- Enrich_Go(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02", v)

EnrichGo_Traj24 <- Enrich_Go(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj24", v)

EnrichGo_Traj45 <- Enrich_Go(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj45", v)

EnrichGo_Traj515 <- Enrich_Go(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515", v)

EnrichGo_Traj1530 <- Enrich_Go(fit2, "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", v)


saveRDS(EnrichGo_Traj02, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/EnrichGo_Traj02_All.RDS")
saveRDS(EnrichGo_Traj24, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/EnrichGo_Traj24_All.RDS")
saveRDS(EnrichGo_Traj45, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/EnrichGo_Traj45_All.RDS")
saveRDS(EnrichGo_Traj515, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/EnrichGo_Traj515_All.RDS")
saveRDS(EnrichGo_Traj1530, "data/DGE/Species/concat/RowMeans/All/EnrichGo_Traj1530_All.RDS")
```


```{r Updating Website, eval = FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}

Trajectory_go_results_lcpm1_4SpTp$Traj45_genes$Both_neg


# git -> commit all changes
# git -> push
# wflow_publish("analysis/RNA_DGE_Interactions_RMG0.Rmd")

```
